title: M26I/eval-pipeline
summary: Local-first RAG system with a reference-based evaluation harness. Built to abstain rather than hallucinate. Wrapped in a FastAPI service with a swappable LLM provider (local Ollama or hosted Groq) and containerised with Docker. Measures retrieval, abstention, and faithfulness — no API required to run locally, no data egress.

title: XiangLuoyang/palantir-foundry-workstation
summary: Single-file HTML reproduction of Palantir Foundry's core abstractions. 7 components, zero deps, double-click to run.

title: Daksh-Aneja-Projects/KAEOS
summary: Open-source company brain where AI agents earn autonomy. Compliance, fairness, HITL and debate gates over a tenant-isolated org graph with Postgres RLS. Runs fully local on Ollama. Apache 2.0.

title: laurykb/ai_for_requirements
summary: RAG + multi-agent system for security requirements engineering, hybrid retrieval, MCP server, ReAct agent, 100% local.

title: Amanbatra03/invoice-extractor
summary: Analyst-grade invoice extraction: LangGraph agentic RAG + hybrid retrieval (BM25+ChromaDB RRF) for PDFs, Gemini 2.0 Flash vision for images. OCR fallback, arithmetic validation, extraction persistence, multi-invoice comparison. Fully offline PDF mode.

title: suzana92/devscan-ai
summary: Privacy-first AI code review - runs 100% locally via Ollama

title: hysel/local-engineering-agent-pack
summary: Local-first, cross-platform AI toolkit with evidence-gated agent workflows, hardware-aware model selection, Ollama support, and safe software-engineering automation.

title: igurss/mlx-chronos
summary: Community-driven benchmark suite for MLX inference engines on Apple Silicon

title: jlldavies/dt
summary: Natural language data transformer CLI - pipe data in, describe what you want in English

title: orkun-soylu/calivi
summary: Self-hosted chat UI for Ollama & OpenAI-compatible servers — you pick which model runs where.

title: ricardozmt/claude-in-your-pocket
summary: OpenClaude 2026: AI Coding Agent in Your Pocket – No Server, No PC

title: EndoTheDev/OMeter
summary: Benchmark and compare Ollama models across local and cloud endpoints with rich, sortable tables.

title: evilsysadmin/platform-lab
summary: Local Kubernetes platform lab. GitOps, observability and AI workloads

title: M-TEKA-T-A-MXZTAR/MXZTAR-forge-v2.0
summary: Local-first creative concept-engineering forge that turns source art into visual intelligence, reusable structures, concept briefs, prompt packs, and guided production workflows.

title: bradleybond512/crystal-ball
summary: Tauri 2 desktop intelligence platform — Cesium.js 3D globe, 185 live panels, MCP server for Claude Code, and an explainable algorithm intelligence layer (truth scoring, evidence graph, compound risk, forecast calibration) plus shortage / weather / insights engines. 600+ deterministic tests.

title: MSteier/Vodou-Web-Browser
summary: A privacy-first desktop web browser (PyQt6 / Qt WebEngine) with a built-in encrypted password vault, local SearXNG search, on-device AI summaries, and no telemetry.

title: joshgummersall/ankix
summary: Turn Kindle vocabulary highlights and YouTube subtitles into Anki flashcards automatically, using a local Ollama model

title: 0Smallcat0/legal-agent
summary: A testbed for faithful, auditable retrieval: Taiwan legal assistant with five anti-hallucination gates and a time-sliced statute store that cites the law in force at the event's date.

title: zlatko-lakisic/agentic-orchestration
summary: Model-agnostic multi-agent orchestration built on CrewAI. YAML-driven agent and MCP catalogs, dynamic LLM planning, sessions, and pluggable execution — mix Ollama, OpenAI, Anthropic, HuggingFace, and your own tools without rewriting orchestration logic.

title: theiskaa/hedos
summary: Run and serve local models headlessly
